weather_report:
With a gentle breeze brushing through the cool Boston night, the air carries a crispness that hints at the warm glow of the day ahead. As clouds recede, a patch of stars twinkles softly in the indigo sky, creating a serene canvas for the night. The anticipated morning promises bright sunshine, inviting residents to shed the remnants of evening chill. When dawn breaks, temperatures will rise steadily, cloaking the city in warmth as the sun ascends, casting vibrant hues across the skyline. 

As the day unfolds, you might find yourself drawn outdoors, perhaps to a leisurely stroll through the winding streets or the charm of a local café, sipping coffee while watching the world wake up. Dress in layers; a light jacket may serve well in the early hours, but as the sun climbs overhead, a comfortable tee will offer solace from the day’s warmth. Enjoy the pleasant embrace of summer as it stretches over Boston, encouraging simply relaxed moments amidst the rhythmic pulse of urban life.
